narrative:
Cuy Falls 8-B (precinct in Summit County) has 1,064 registered voters, with 57.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.8%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.5 percentage points.
